description_long: This rifle features a blocky, angular design with a predominantly dark gray body and a striking red grip and magazine area. The upper receiver and barrel are solid and rectangular, with minimal surface detailing except for a few ridges and a small sight post on top. The grip and magazine are visually distinct, rendered in a bold red color, and appear to be integrated as a single unit. The trigger guard is visible beneath the receiver, and the overall silhouette is compact, resembling a modern tactical firearm. The muzzle is squared off, lacking any visible attachments or devices. The rifle's construction suggests a robust, utilitarian build suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, blocky rifle with a dark gray body and a bold red grip and magazine, featuring a simple, angular design and minimal surface detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the squared-off muzzle and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red grip and magazine, as well as the angular receiver and trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver and the alignment of the grip and magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the red grip and magazine, with clear visibility of the receiver's blocky shape.
